What I Built
Projects
PROJECT 01
Hotel Management Website

A fully responsive, multi-page hotel management website built from scratch using pure HTML5 and CSS3. Features a clean UI with modern design principles.

  • Multi-page: Home, About, Rooms, Services, Gallery, Booking, Contact
  • Room listing with types, prices & amenities
  • Booking form with HTML validation
  • Hover effects, custom color themes & typography
  • Cross-browser compatible & mobile-friendly
